title: Payroll Coordinator
description: Costco is seeking a Payroll Coordinator to manage payroll processing for our Portland distribution center and regional headquarters. You will process pay cycles, manage employee data, ensure regulatory compliance, and provide payroll support to managers and employees. This role requires meticulous attention to accuracy and deadlines.
responsibilities: Process bi-weekly payroll for hourly and salaried employees
Verify timekeeping data and resolve discrepancies
Manage employee master data and maintain data accuracy
Prepare and distribute pay statements and tax documents
Ensure compliance with federal, state, and local tax regulations
Support managers with payroll questions and documentation

requirements.education: Bachelor's degree in Accounting, Finance, or Business Administration preferred; high school diploma minimum
skills: Payroll processing systems and HRIS platforms
Knowledge of payroll taxes and regulations

benefits: Costco employee discount (2% of salary or more)
Paid time off and health/wellness programs
